inline_comments.message: What is the purpose of this change? It seems to make things more complex than before.

In case of using for-each loop over map, EntrySet consistently showed better performance than using KeySet.
Citations:
1) https://howtodoinjava.com/java/collections/hashmap/performance-comparison-of-different-ways-to-iterate-over-hashmap/
2) https://gist.github.com/AFulgens/42ef34d625dd5b00f62d9ed77e727ccb
3) Sonar Statement: https://sonar.onap.org/coding_rules#rule_key=squid%3AS2864

Although I initially forgot to change to entry.getValues() in line 316. I corrected that and uploaded a new patch.
